analysis_report.title: Summary
analysis_report.content: Based on LSTM neural network analysis of NFLX's recent market data, the model predicts an downward price movement for the next trading day with low confidence (52%). This prediction is derived from a combination of technical indicators, price momentum, trading volume patterns, and news sentiment analysis.

analysis_report.title: Price Action & Trend
analysis_report.content: NFLX has shown a slight downward trend recently, with an average daily return of -0.27%. Over the last 20 trading sessions, the stock moved from $87.89 to $83.33 (-5.19%). The technical score of 47% suggests a neutral technical outlook.

analysis_report.title: Volume Analysis
analysis_report.content: Trading volume is near the average level (ratio: 1.25x), suggesting normal market participation. This indicates steady interest without extreme buying or selling pressure.

analysis_report.title: News Sentiment
analysis_report.content: News sentiment analysis shows a moderately positive score of 59%. Recent news about NFLX leans positive, suggesting generally favorable market perception, though not overwhelmingly bullish.

analysis_report.title: Key Drivers
analysis_report.content: The LSTM model identified the most influential factors for this prediction as: MACD Histogram (12%), Volatility (11%), News Sentiment (11%). MACD Histogram is the most significant factor in the model's decision-making process.

analysis_report.title: Model Confidence
analysis_report.content: The LSTM model achieved 60% accuracy and 0% F1-score on the test dataset. These metrics suggest reasonable predictive performance, though past performance does not guarantee future accuracy. This model is designed for educational and research purposes only and should not be used as the sole basis for investment decisions.
